summary:
The available literature does not contain any direct experimental data showing that *Eucommia ulmoides* leaf extract reduces high-fat diet-induced hepatosteatosis; thus, no definitive conclusion can be drawn from current findings regarding its efficacy against fatty liver.  
\boxed{\text{B}}
